title: Toffy's Hooks
description: Small mod that adds Grappling Hooks and other hook related equipment.
body:
![Key art render showing the creator's skin swinging with the hook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c833def195b3be785443f07ba82cd6e65c339cc0_0.webp)
Toffy's Hooks aims to expand the player's arsenal and movement.
There are currently 4 features and 1 ingrediant, being :
1. The Hook, which is used to craft other Items.
> ![The Image shows how to craft a Hook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6187528cc8a93627a84b47ea1991c1cb1a2a2716_0.webp)
2. The Grappling Hook, which allows you to swing around like Spiderman, it has the same functionality as the lashing potato from 24w14potato.
> ![The Image shows how to craft a Grappling Hook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62b0eda5c7b77ce9b8c72e3494acb94080aaf806.png)
3. The Ice Skates, which makes every block slippery like Ice, and Ice extra slippery!
> ![The Image shows how to craft Ice Skates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48f019d18441bac9fa608780719102173cf6ac7c.png)
4. The Hookaxe/Multitool, which allows the player to mine any block time with the efficiency of the Iron Version of their native tool, but doesn't allow right click functionality.
> ![The Image shows how to craft a Hook Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e61acaea4c6f27f6fa326cc82430e3c848105b54.png)
5. The Climbing Claws, which allows the player to climb walls, like in Terraria.
> ![Image shows how to craft Climbing Claws.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/945d82dedb82d8ffbb2b5390ccc02f6b6c33f372.png)
